_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+devel/
+logs/
+build/
+bin/
+lib/
+msg_gen/
+srv_gen/
+msg/*Action.msg
+msg/*ActionFeedback.msg
+msg/*ActionGoal.msg
+msg/*ActionResult.msg
+msg/*Feedback.msg
+msg/*Goal.msg
+msg/*Result.msg
+msg/_*.py
+build_isolated/
+devel_isolated/
+
+# Generated by dynamic reconfigure
+*.cfgc
+/cfg/cpp/
+/cfg/*.py
+
+# Ignore generated docs
+*.dox
+*.wikidoc
+
+# eclipse stuff
+.project
+.cproject
+
+# qcreator stuff
+CMakeLists.txt.user
+
+srv/_*.py
+*.pcd
+*.pyc
+qtcreator-*
+*.user
+
+/planning/cfg
+/planning/docs
+/planning/src
+
+*~
+
+# Emacs
+.#*
+
+# Catkin custom files
+CATKIN_IGNORE

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# unitree_ros
+A ros package to control the unitree go1 robot

data.author: sahinkaan
data.message: get_quaternion function is fixed according to https://unitree-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/get_started/Go1_Edu.html#go1-sdk-highstate-imu

files.patch:
@@ -30,15 +30,16 @@ link_directories(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/utils/unitree_legged_sdk/lib/cpp/${ARCH})
 set(EXTRA_LIBS -pthread libunitree_legged_sdk.so)
 set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "-O3 -fPIC")
 
-include_directories(include ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/utils/unitree_legged_sdk/include)
+include_directories(include 
+                   ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/utils/unitree_legged_sdk/include)
 
 add_executable(unitree_ros src/unitree_ros_node.cpp)
 target_link_libraries(unitree_ros ${EXTRA_LIBS})
 ament_target_dependencies(unitree_ros rclcpp std_msgs)
 
 install(
-  DIRECTORY include/unitree_ros
-  DIRECTORY include/unitree_legged_sdk
+  DIRECTORY include
+  DIRECTORY  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/utils/unitree_legged_sdk/include
   DESTINATION include
 )
 
@@ -49,5 +50,4 @@ install(TARGETS
   INCLUDES DESTINATION include
 )
 
-
 ament_package()
